name: Clip Blender CHOP
description: License: Only available in TouchDesigner Pro.
summary: License: Only available in TouchDesigner Pro.

parameters.name: Default Clip CHOP
parameters.label: Default Clip CHOP
parameters.description: Parameter of this operator. See operator description for details.

parameters.name: DAT List
parameters.label: DAT List
parameters.description: datlist - Operator path to a valid Table DAT.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.label: Target
parameters.description:
target -  - This parameter works in conjunction with the root transform channels as defined on the Channels page of the clpblender  as well as the Clip CHOP parameter called Position Type. When Position Type is set to "Blend To Target" it will blend the root transform channels for the current clip to the new position defined in this parameter.

 targetx - targety - targetz -

parameters.name: X
parameters.label: X
parameters.description: targetx - targety - targetz -

parameters.name: Play Speed
parameters.label: Play Speed
parameters.description: playspeed - Provides a scale value to slow down or speed up the playback of the animation sequence.

parameters.name: Step Forward
parameters.label: Step Forward
parameters.description: stepforward - Unknown

parameters.name: Step Backward
parameters.label: Step Backward
parameters.description: stepbackward - Unknown

parameters.name: A End Script
parameters.label: A End Script
parameters.description: aend - Broken

parameters.name: Delay Samples
parameters.label: Delay Samples
parameters.description: delay - Delays the output of animation data by the specified number of samples.

parameters.name: Reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: reset - When On, resets the clipblender and holds it ready to play the clip defined by the Default Clip  parameter.

parameters.name: Reset Pulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: resetpulse - Instantly reset the cliblender and start playing the clip defined by the Default Clip  parameter.

parameters.name: Output Time Remaining
parameters.label: Output Time Remaining
parameters.description: timeremaining - A channel of the name defined in this parameter will return the time remaining in the current clip.

parameters.name: Time Channel
parameters.label: Time Channel
parameters.description: timechannel - A channel of the name defined in this parameter will return the time elapsed in the current clip.

parameters.name: X Root Trans
parameters.label: X Root Trans
parameters.description: xtrans - The translate X channel of the animation hierarchy that defines the Clipblender Motion Root.

parameters.name: Y Root Trans
parameters.label: Y Root Trans
parameters.description: ytrans - The translate Y channel of the animation hierarchy that defines the Clipblender Motion Root.

parameters.name: Z Root Trans
parameters.label: Z Root Trans
parameters.description: ztrans - The translate Z channel of the animation hierarchy that defines the Clipblender Motion Root.

parameters.name: X Root Rot
parameters.label: X Root Rot
parameters.description: xrot - The rotate X channel of the animation hierarchy that defines the Clipblender Motion Root.

parameters.name: Y Root Rot
parameters.label: Y Root Rot
parameters.description: yrot - The rotate Y channel of the animation hierarchy that defines the Clipblender Motion Root.

parameters.name: Z Root Rot
parameters.label: Z Root Rot
parameters.description: zrot - The rotate Z channel of the animation hierarchy that defines the Clipblender Motion Root.

parameters.name: Queue Enable
parameters.label: Queue Enable
parameters.description: qenable - Specifies the name of the queue enable channel that may be added to all animation clips that will be loaded into this clipblender. A "Queue Enable" channel may be added to the animation clip to define when this clip is safe and unsafe for blending into other clips. If the animation is not safe for blending, the channel would be set to 1, which means the clipblender should "Queue" the next clip in the sequence instead of playing it.  When the channel is 0, the any animation request will be executed immediately.

parameters.name: Queue Trigger
parameters.label: Queue Trigger
parameters.description: qtrigger - Unknown

parameters.name: Pre-Rotate Adds
parameters.label: Pre-Rotate Adds
parameters.description: prerotate - Unknown

parameters.description: doxform -

parameters.name: Time Slice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: timeslice - Turning this on forces the channels to be "Time Sliced".  A  is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: Scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: scope - To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a  string on the Common page.

parameters.name: Sample Rate Match
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description:
srselect -  - Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Options are not available.

 first - Use rate of first input to resample others. max - Resample to the highest sample rate. min - Resample to the lowest sample rate. err - Doesn't accept conflicting sample rates.

parameters.name: Resample At First Input's Rate
parameters.label: Resample At First Input's Rate
parameters.description: first - Use rate of first input to resample others. max - Resample to the highest sample rate. min - Resample to the lowest sample rate. err - Doesn't accept conflicting sample rates.

parameters.name: Export Method
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description:
exportmethod -  - This will determine how to connect the  channel to the parameter. Refer to the Export article for more information.

 datindex - Uses the docked  table and references the channel via the index of the channel in the . datname - Uses the docked  table and references the channel via the name of the channel in the . autoname - The channel is the full destination of where to export to, such has geo1/transform1:tx.

parameters.name: DAT Table by Index
parameters.label: DAT Table by Index
parameters.description: datindex - Uses the docked  table and references the channel via the index of the channel in the . datname - Uses the docked  table and references the channel via the name of the channel in the . autoname - The channel is the full destination of where to export to, such has geo1/transform1:tx.

parameters.name: Export Root
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: autoexportroot - This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by Channel Name is : are relative to.

parameters.name: Export Table
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: exporttable - The  used to hold the export information when using the  Table  Methods (See above).
